name: Lorna | Terrible Mouse
description:
"Put on a smiling face with you guys. I'm really going to throw up!"

(Yes I changed the quote because it makes more sense.)

Holy shit, another spooky bot released on the month of OCTOBER??? I guess you could say it is the spooky month!
Alright enough bullshit, you get the gist of it. Halloween, October, Spooky month, blah blah blah.

So, this is the second bot I am making from the Terrible Mouse animation series. But I bet you're questioning right now... why the fuck did I make her last name "mousefield"? Simple. Because as weird as it is, it sorta suits her. But mainly because when I was talking to a Lorna bot, pretending to be a CIA Agent, the bot gave her the last name, "Mousefield", so I thought hey, weird but fitting! (Don't worry, I'll change it if Gutian gives her a canon last name)

Update: I removed her last name, screw it. I wanna keep it accurate.

On a serious note, I really recommend you check out the Terrible Mouse animation series. As frightening as it is, it really gives you a good fright and suspense. Not to mention, the animation is somewhat good.

Here's a link to the animation series, enjoy it on your own time:

  • Terrible Mouse | Episode 1

  • Terrible Mouse | Episode 2

  • Terrible Mouse | Episode 3

  • Terrible Mouse | Episode 4

Okay, now let me go over the bot. Here is some information about her:

  • Lorna was originally in a cage with other mouse test subjects used for experimenting on them by humans

  • She has Trauma from watching other mice being taken apart by scientists

  • Lorna was the hospital's owner, but in TM, the owner was replaced by the Hospital Owner, and Lorna is now the mascot of the hospital.

  • Lorna is a member of "Bloodbath", revealed in a photo of the Episode 3, where she wears a uniform with the owner who appears to be wearing just
